calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for for Plaintiff: M. Patel, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Hugo Sotil.
Exhibit 1 - Three Day Notice---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2084 Mission St., #322, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,605.00
Costs $151.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Continued To Oct-17-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF M PATEL
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HUGO SOTIL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
